title: Chiy'el #2419
definition:
Hiel = "God lives"

 1) a native of Bethel who rebuilt Jericho in the reign of Ahab and in
    whom was fulfilled the curse pronounced by Joshua
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hiel = "God lives"

 1) a native of Bethel who rebuilt Jericho in the reign of Ahab and in
    whom was fulfilled the curse pronounced by Joshua

    NASB:  prob. brother of God, a rebuilder of Jericho
